{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20841_1
|class_id=20841
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20841_2
|fame=13
|art=15
|fth=17
|civ=13
|tech=32
|ss1=Snail DEF +10<br>Per 200 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +1<br>Avatar Score: 10000/10000
|ss2=Snail DEF +20<br>Per 200 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +2<br>Avatar Score: 10000/10000
|ss3=Snail DEF +30<br>Per 200 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +3<br>Avatar Score: 10000/10000
|ss4=Snail DEF +30<br>Per 200 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +3<br>Avatar Score: 10000/10000
|ss7=Snail DEF +30<br>Per 200 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +3<br>Avatar Score: 10000/10000<br> (Awakened)
}}
